author: doll-agent
content: Implemented modf() in ferray-ufunc::ops::floatintrinsic. Returns (fractional, integer) tuple matching the C / NumPy convention. Handles NaN (both NaN), ±Infinity (frac=±0, int=±inf), and standard split-via-trunc cases. Generic over T: Element + Float. 5 unit tests cover positive/negative/NaN/Inf/f32 paths. Re-exported via ferray-ufunc lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate.
